/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/dhgr_render_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/Apple2Display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/LeChatMauveCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_dhgr_render.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_dhgr_render  -ldl -lm
